narrative: Trump rejection of Iran proposal elevates geopolitical risk as crude surges toward $100 — USD/JPY firms to 157.26 on the news; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid despite rising Middle East tensions. Gold higher +0.07%; equities +0.07%; DXY +0.06%; VIX 18.4. AUD/JPY bilateral divergence dominates G8 themes (spread 1.018%) as RBA 4.35% vs BoJ 0.75% carry anchors the 360bp advantage. Watch US CPI tomorrow at 12:30 UTC.
